summary: Architect Role & Dashboard feature complete. All features tested and working: Backend APIs (100% pass), Frontend UI (100% pass). Fixed GM Dashboard Design tab switching issue (missing 'design' in validTabs array).

fixes_applied.issue: Design tab not switching when clicked - 'design' was missing from validTabs array
fixes_applied.fix: Added 'design' to validTabs array in onValueChange handler

Backend_API_Tests.GET /api/architect/projects: PASS - Returns projects without financial data
Backend_API_Tests.GET /api/architect/projects/{id}/site-pl: PASS - Returns site plans with status workflow
Backend_API_Tests.POST /api/architect/projects/{id}/site-p: PASS - Creates site plan with yet_to_start status
Backend_API_Tests.GET /api/architect/pending-approvals (GM: PASS - Returns pending site plan approvals
Backend_API_Tests.GET /api/architect/projects/{id}/all-des: PASS - Returns combined site plans + design files

features_verified: ✅ Architect user can log in (architect@constructionos.com / Demo@1234) and lands on /architect-dashboard
✅ Architect dashboard shows all projects with no financial data (no project value/payments shown)
✅ Projects table shows Site Plans count, Design Files count, pending approval badge
✅ Search and Status filter work on architect dashboard
✅ Clicking 'Open' on a project shows project detail with Site Plans and 3D & Elevations tabs
✅ Site Plans tab: shows floor list with S.No, Floor Name, Google Drive Link, Status, Remarks, Actions
✅ Site Plans: Add Floor dialog creates new site plan with floor_name, drive_link, remarks
✅ Site Plans: Edit action opens edit dialog and saves changes
✅ Site Plans: Delete action removes the plan
✅ Site Plans: Submit action changes status to 'approval_waiting'
✅ Site Plans: Status can be changed from 'yet_to_start' to 'design'
✅ Site Plans: Status summary cards shown below table
✅ 3D & Elevations tab: Shows 3D Photos section and Elevation Photos section separately
✅ 3D & Elevations: Add 3D Photo and Add Elevation buttons work
✅ Design files have Google Drive link field and it opens in new tab
✅ GM Dashboard: New 'Design' tab with badge count shows pending site plan approvals
✅ GM Dashboard: Can approve/reject site plans from the Design tab
✅ ProjectDetail Documents tab: Shows architect design data (site plans + design files) below regular documents
✅ Backend API: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE for /api/architect/projects/{id}/site-plans
✅ Backend API: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE for /api/architect/projects/{id}/design-files
✅ Backend API: POST /api/architect/projects/{id}/site-plans/{id}/submit
✅ Backend API: GET /api/architect/pending-approvals (GM only)
✅ Backend API: PATCH /api/architect/site-plans/{id}/approve (GM only)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent. Clean separation between Architect and GM approval workflows.
Status workflow (yet_to_start → design → approval_waiting → approved) is well implemented.
Financial data correctly excluded from architect projects endpoint.
GM Dashboard validTabs array fix applied - was missing 'design' causing tab not to switch.

test_credentials.Architect: architect@constructionos.com / Demo@1234 or Demo Access tab
test_credentials.GM: gm@constructionos.com / Demo@1234 or Demo Access tab
test_credentials.Super Admin: admin@constructionos.com / Demo@1234 or Demo Access tab
test_credentials.Test Project: proj_murugan_001 (Villa Murugan - Vadapalani) with 3 site plans and 2 design files

seed_data_creation: Used existing Villa Murugan project with pre-seeded site plans (Ground Floor, First Floor, Terrace) and design files (3D Render, Elevation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Architect role fully implemented and tested. Test project: proj_murugan_001. Site plan status workflow: yet_to_start → design → approval_waiting → approved. GM can approve/reject from Design tab. Documents tab shows Architect Designs section with all site plans and design files.
rca_of_issue: Fixed GM Dashboard Design tab not switching - 'design' was missing from validTabs array in onValueChange handler (line 331). Changed 'accounts' to 'accountant' and added 'design' to the array.
